context: Operator note after review-2026-06-11-01: inconsistent with workstream 0016, which relocated gaps to .lume/gaps/ for state co-location; accumulated reviews will clutter the .lume root alongside workstreams/ and gaps/. Proposed: .lume/reviews/<date>-NN/ with migration of the existing folder.

resolution.note: Resolved by workstream 0017 review-dir-and-landing: reviews now live under .lume/reviews/<date>-NN/ (engine, docs, tests updated; existing folder migrated)

title: Review artifacts land at .lume/review-<date>-NN/ in the .lume root instead of a co-located .lume/reviews/ subdir
